_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning how using consistent tense through verbs and verb groups keeps our writing clear and easy to follow.

_source.w: We are learning how using consistent tense through verbs and verb groups keeps our writing clear and easy to follow.
y: Tense consistency is essential for clear communication — inconsistency confuses readers.
Understanding verb groups helps us express precise time relationships in our writing.
This is a fundamental skill for all types of extended writing.
eg: We identify tense inconsistencies in a text and discuss how they create confusion.
We edit a passage to make the tense consistent throughout.
We discuss how some texts deliberately shift tense for effect — like flashbacks in narratives.
We analyse how verb groups like 'had been working' express complex time relationships.
We check our own extended writing for tense consistency before submitting it.
We compare the same events described in different tenses and discuss the effects.
